creator: robrob2626@yahoo.com
text:
I am getting constant kernel panics with VIMAGE and PF on FreeBSD 9-RELEASE with jails.

I have tried diffrent PF configurations with VIMAGE + epair or VIMAGE + netgragh and still get kernel panics.
The kernel panics stop as soon as I disable PF in rc.conf.

I am attaching an example pic of said panics.
http://i40.tinypic.com/2q00etz.jpg

Fix: 

NONE
How-To-Repeat: Example of setup PF + VIMAGE + epair.
http://wiki.polymorf.fr/index.php/Howto:FreeBSD_jail_vnet

Example of setup PF + VIMAGE + netgragh  
http://druidbsd.sourceforge.net/vimage.shtml
